title: DELETE /api/v1/statuses/:id
description: Implement post deletion. Verify the authed account owns the post. Delete from posts table. Enqueue a Delete activity to delivery_queue targeting all followers' inboxes. Return the deleted status object (clients expect this). Trigger streaming delete event.
design: Delete activity: {type:Delete, actor:actor_uri, object:{type:Tombstone, id:ap_id}}. Determine inbox list: all remote follower shared inboxes + all inboxes for remote followers without shared inbox. Dedup by shared inbox URL. Enqueue to delivery_queue.
acceptance_criteria: Delete from Ivory removes the post; followers on mastodon.social see a delete notification; streaming clients receive 'delete' event with the status ID; deleting another account's post returns 403; deleting non-existent post returns 404
